decision.archive_summary: The regression work for Codex context minor GC was completed and stabilized. Fixed behavior included allowing guarded relation `continue` while preserving shadow-guard veto precedence, and adding fixed live eval coverage for harder natural Chinese multi-turn topic-switch/return cases, including `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` and the earlier editor-update detour regression. The user also expressed a durable preference to avoid whitelist-style or hardcoded handling. The latest action was to automatically rerun the live eval via `node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown` and report it as run.
